general.title: Music Classes
general.description: Learn classical and western instruments from expert instructors. We offer structured courses, flexible timings, and certified training in a professional environment.
general.location_address: 104, Pawansut Building, Tanaji Nagar Road, Malad East, Mumbai - 97
general.enrolment_note: To enrol in a class or schedule a free trial session, please contact us directly on WhatsApp or call our instructors.
